recommendations.title: anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day - The Movie
recommendations.overview: A year has passed since Menma's ghostly return to the Super Peace Busters. Although the time they spent together during that summer was short, the five members reminisce about what happened as they each write a letter to their lost friend.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: Godzilla Minus One
recommendations.overview: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

recommendations.title: Steins;Gate: The Movie - Load Region of Déjà Vu
recommendations.overview: One year after the events of the anime, Rintarou begins to feel the repercussions of extensive time travel, and eventually completely fades from reality. Kurisu, being the only companion to remember him, now must find a way to bring him back.
recommendations.director: Hiroshi Hamasaki, Takuya Sato, Kanji Wakabayashi
